summary: Completed testing of 5 new enhancement features: Onboarding Wizard, Quick-Start Templates, Emergency Access Protocol, and Beneficiary Gentle Intro. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tested for Dashboard, Checklist with templates, and AcceptInvitationPage. All core functionality working correctly.

issues: Only 2 templates (Hospice, Military) visible by default - 'View all' button needed to see New Parent and Recently Married templates. This is intentional UX but worth noting.

passed_tests: Feature 1 - Onboarding: GET /api/onboarding/progress returns 5 steps with completion status (2/5 for founder)
Feature 1 - Onboarding: POST /api/onboarding/complete-step/{step_key} marks step complete
Feature 1 - Onboarding: POST /api/onboarding/dismiss hides the wizard
Feature 1 - Onboarding: All endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Feature 4 - Templates: GET /api/templates/scenarios returns 4 templates with correct item counts
Feature 4 - Templates: hospice=14, military=10, new_parent=9, recently_married=9 items
Feature 4 - Templates: POST /api/templates/apply adds template items to checklist
Feature 5 - Emergency Access: POST /api/emergency-access/request requires beneficiary role (403 for owner)
Feature 5 - Emergency Access: GET /api/emergency-access/my-requests returns user's requests
Feature 5 - Emergency Access: GET /api/emergency-access/active returns active grants
Feature 5 - Emergency Access: GET /api/admin/emergency-access requires admin role (403 for benefactor)
Feature 5 - Emergency Access: All endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with user stats and Estate Readiness Score
Frontend: Checklist page shows Quick Templates button
Frontend: Quick-Start Templates component expands with Hospice and Military templates visible
Frontend: AcceptInvitationPage correctly handles invalid/expired tokens
Frontend: AcceptInvitationPage shows 'Invalid Invitation' error with 'Go to Login' button
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 - Onboarding: Auto-detects progress from actual data (estates, docs, beneficiaries) - well implemented
Feature 4 - Templates: Duplicate item prevention via title matching - good deduplication logic
Feature 5 - Emergency Access: Proper role-based access control (beneficiary for requests, admin for management)
Feature 3 - AcceptInvitationPage: Two-step warm intro flow implemented with password strength indicators
seed_data_creation: Applied Hospice (13 items) and Military (10 items) templates to founder's estate during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 new features fully tested and working: (1) Onboarding Wizard - auto-detects 2/5 progress for founder (create_estate + add_beneficiary), dismiss works; (2) Quick-Start Templates - 4 templates available (hospice:14, military:10, new_parent:9, recently_married:9), apply works; (3) Emergency Access - role-based (beneficiary can request, admin can manage), founder is benefactor so gets 403 on request; (4) AcceptInvitationPage - shows error for invalid tokens, warm intro requires valid token. Onboarding wizard was dismissed during tests - undismiss by clearing dismissed flag in DB if needed.

feature_1_onboarding_wizard.notes: Auto-calculates progress from actual data. Founder shows 2/5 (create_estate, add_beneficiary)

feature_5_emergency_access.notes: Request requires beneficiary role, admin endpoints require admin role. Founder is benefactor so gets 403 (expected)

feature_3_beneficiary_gentle_intro.notes: AcceptInvitationPage loads and handles invalid tokens correctly. Full two-step warm intro flow requires valid invitation token which we don't have in preview.
